LanguageData.archotechoath.label: <color=#D4AF37>archotech oath</color>
LanguageData.archotechoath.description:
A fragmentary archotech protocol has taken root in the host's nervous system. It does not grant divinity, but it compels relentless refinement of thought, craft, leadership, and endurance.
created/edited by easyrim
LanguageData.archotechoath_cognition.label: oracle cognition
LanguageData.archotechoath_cognition.description:
Pattern prediction and disciplined thought elevate learning and research.
created/edited by easyrim
LanguageData.archotechoath_industry.label: forgebound discipline
LanguageData.archotechoath_industry.description:
Fine motor control and tireless routine turn labor into precision craft.
created/edited by easyrim
LanguageData.archotechoath_command.label: governor cadence
LanguageData.archotechoath_command.description:
Measured speech and composure steady allies and bend negotiations.
created/edited by easyrim
LanguageData.archotechoath_aegis.label: self-repair aegis
LanguageData.archotechoath_aegis.description:
Micromechanites prioritize structural integrity and rapid recovery under stress.
created/edited by easyrim
LanguageData.archotechoath_labsync.label: lab sync protocol
LanguageData.archotechoath_labsync.description:
Out of direct combat, cognitive routines lock onto research and precision craft throughput.
created/edited by easyrim
LanguageData.archotechoath_warprotocol.label: warprotocol lattice
LanguageData.archotechoath_warprotocol.description:
Combat telemetry routes cognition into targeting, movement prediction, and damage control loops.
created/edited by easyrim
LanguageData.archotechoath_emergency_bulkhead.label: emergency bulkhead
LanguageData.archotechoath_emergency_bulkhead.descrip:
When integrity falls, contingency armor and trauma routing force a stubborn survival state.
created/edited by easyrim
LanguageData.frontierwarden.label: <color=#6B8E23>frontier warden</color>
LanguageData.frontierwarden.description:
Raised by hard land and harder duty, this doctrine shapes a pawn into the colony's shield. They scout farther, shoot cleaner, mend faster, and stand firm where lines would otherwise break.
created/edited by easyrim
LanguageData.frontierwarden_pathfinder.label: pathfinder stride
LanguageData.frontierwarden_pathfinder.description:
Hard-march conditioning improves movement, hauling, and field awareness.
created/edited by easyrim
LanguageData.frontierwarden_fireline.label: fireline doctrine
LanguageData.frontierwarden_fireline.description:
Battlefield drills improve aim discipline and target acquisition under pressure.
created/edited by easyrim
LanguageData.frontierwarden_fieldsurgeon.label: field surgeon's calm
LanguageData.frontierwarden_fieldsurgeon.description:
Triaged instincts and steady hands sustain allies through prolonged campaigns.
created/edited by easyrim
LanguageData.frontierwarden_breachfighter.label: breachfighter resolve
LanguageData.frontierwarden_breachfighter.description:
Close-quarters aggression and stubborn defense hold the line in chaos.
created/edited by easyrim
LanguageData.frontierwarden_overwatch_matrix.label: overwatch matrix
LanguageData.frontierwarden_overwatch_matrix.descript:
Disciplined overwatch mode refines ranged cadence and exposes targets for line-breaking volleys.
created/edited by easyrim
LanguageData.frontierwarden_breach_rampage.label: breach rampage
LanguageData.frontierwarden_breach_rampage.descriptio:
Melee breach posture trades caution for violent breakthrough and sustained close-quarters pressure.
created/edited by easyrim
LanguageData.frontierwarden_camp_triage.label: camp triage command
LanguageData.frontierwarden_camp_triage.description:
Between firefights, the warden shifts to logistics medicine and rapid stabilization of wounded allies.
created/edited by easyrim
LanguageData.archotech_protocol_surge.label: protocol surge
LanguageData.archotech_protocol_surge.description:
Short-term overclock of archotech governance routines for peak combat and production output.
created/edited by easyrim
LanguageData.archotech_lockstep_marked.label: lockstep marked
LanguageData.archotech_lockstep_marked.description:
The target is prediction-locked by archotech telemetry, degrading movement and defensive timing.
created/edited by easyrim
LanguageData.frontier_bulwark_pulse.label: bulwark pulse
LanguageData.frontier_bulwark_pulse.description:
Warden pulse hardens posture and response speed for holding unstable defensive lines.
created/edited by easyrim
